title: lygodium altum
intro: Lygodium altum, also known as the tree fern, is a species of climbing fern native to the tropical regions of Australia, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Lygodium altum include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Lygodium altum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
